title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・暗雲、じゃない

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Geez, I can barely move...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whew... Okay!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Good luck in the next race!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that was a good race... but that's not all it
was.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
After this race, I feel like Spe has gotten
everything she can get out of me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She's probably already thinking of her next race,
about beating Grass.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Even though everyone's already talented, they
keep on working so hard. The more they race, the
better they become.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That means... I...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nah, forget it. It's not like I just had a new
realization or anything.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I've been different from the start. I never had any
innate skills or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been using my head to win. Pretty
obvious, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? About our next race... I was
thinking about the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's a Grand Prix race at the end of the spring
season, held in Kansai.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I think both Spe and Grass are gonna run in it.
And there's something I wanna confirm there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not a race I had in mind for her... But looking
into Sky's determined eyes, there's only one reply
I can give.
choice_data_list: Let's do it. Let's run in the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Right. I'm going to flip the script one more time. I
can do it—I have to.
